x-enumeration-literals.name: Originator
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The entity or customer that initiates the transaction.

Comment:
Customer transferring funds

x-enumeration-literals.name: Approver
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The person or system that approves the transaction before posting.

Comment:
Bank officer approving a high-value payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Executor
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The system or staff that actually performs the posting.

Comment:
Example:
Core banking system posting a loan repayment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The account or party receiving the funds or credits.

Comment:
Example
Loan account receiving repayment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auditor
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Party validating the posting

Comment:
Example
Internal audit or compliance officer
